title: Storybook Story (CSF)
description: Schema for a Storybook Component Story Format (CSF) story definition. Stories describe individual visual states of UI components and are the core unit of Storybook documentation and testing.

name.description: Display name of the story, shown in the Storybook sidebar

args.description: Default argument values for the component in this story. Override the component default args.

parameters.description: Static story metadata used to configure addons and Storybook behavior

decorators.description: Array of decorator functions wrapping the story render function

play.description: Async function executing user interactions for interaction testing

tags.description: Tags for categorizing stories and controlling test inclusion

loaders.description: Async data loading functions run before the story renders

Parameters.description: Storybook story parameters for configuring addons and behavior

layout.description: Story layout in the Storybook canvas

backgrounds.description: Background color options for the story canvas

viewport.description: Viewport dimensions for the story canvas
